title: festuca rupicola var. hirsuta
intro: Festuca rupicola var. hirsuta, also known as hairy alpine fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Festuca rupicola var. hirsuta include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
